mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id FROM hands_on_courses h INNER JOIN ai_course_planning_info p ON h.task_type = p.syb_type WHERE h.account = #{account} AND h.task_status = 'finished' AND p.course_level = '实战' ORDER BY p.id
SELECT account, task_type, task_status, task_info, update_time FROM hands_on_courses WHERE account = #{account} AND task_type = #{taskType} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hands_on_courses ( account, task_type, task_status, task_info, update_time ) VALUES ( #{account}, #{taskType}, #{taskStatus}, #{taskInfo}, NOW() )
